title: Saman Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Saman Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: Saman Bird Sanctuary is a wetland in Mainpuri district, in western Uttar Pradesh.
overview.description: Saman Bird Sanctuary is a wetland in Mainpuri district, in western Uttar Pradesh. Located in the village of Saman, it has been designated as a protected Ramsar site since 2019.

topPlaces.name: Sauj
topPlaces.description: Sauj (Sauj) is a village in Karhal block of Mainpuri district, Uttar Pradesh. An old village going back at least as far as the late 1500s, Sauj was historically the seat of a pargana until 1840.

topPlaces.name: Saman, Mainpuri
topPlaces.description: Saman (or Samān) is a large village in Kishni block of Mainpuri district, Uttar Pradesh. It is the site of the Saman Bird Sanctuary, a large wetland area designated as a protected Ramsar site since 2019.

topPlaces.name: Gadanpur
topPlaces.description: Gadanpur is a village in Karhal block of Mainpuri district, Uttar Pradesh, India. As of 2011, it had a population of 1,842, in 314 households.

topPlaces.name: Azizpur
topPlaces.description: Azizpur is a census town in Agra district in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Pharenji
topPlaces.description: Pharenji (Phareñjī) is a village in Kishni block of Mainpuri district, Uttar Pradesh. As of 2011, it has a total population of 6,105, in 1,066 households.

topPlaces.name: Chauraipur
topPlaces.description: Chauraipur (Chaurāīpur) is a village in Kishni block of Mainpuri district, Uttar Pradesh, India. As of 2011, it had a total population of 3,557, in 688 households.

topPlaces.name: Birsinghpur, Karhal
topPlaces.description: Birsinghpur (Bīrsiṅhpur) is a village in Karhal block of Mainpuri district, Uttar Pradesh. As of 2011, it had a population of 832, in 148 households.

topPlaces.name: Paliya, Mainpuri
topPlaces.description: Paliya (Pāliyā), also spelled Palia, is a village in Karhal block of Mainpuri district, Uttar Pradesh. As of 2011, it had a population of 2,233, in 427 households.

items.note: Sauj (Sauj) is a village in Karhal block of Mainpuri district, Uttar Pradesh. An old village going back at least as far as the late 1500s, Sauj was historically the seat of a pargana until 1840.

Saman (or Samān) is a large village in Kishni block of Mainpuri district, Uttar Pradesh. It is the site of the Saman Bird Sanctuary, a large wetland area designated as a protected Ramsar site since 2019.
Gadanpur is a village in Karhal block of Mainpuri district, Uttar Pradesh, India. As of 2011, it had a population of 1,842, in 314 households.
Azizpur is a census town in Agra district in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India.
Pharenji (Phareñjī) is a village in Kishni block of Mainpuri district, Uttar Pradesh. As of 2011, it has a total population of 6,105, in 1,066 households.
Chauraipur (Chaurāīpur) is a village in Kishni block of Mainpuri district, Uttar Pradesh, India. As of 2011, it had a total population of 3,557, in 688 households.
Birsinghpur (Bīrsiṅhpur) is a village in Karhal block of Mainpuri district, Uttar Pradesh. As of 2011, it had a population of 832, in 148 households.
Paliya (Pāliyā), also spelled Palia, is a village in Karhal block of Mainpuri district, Uttar Pradesh. As of 2011, it had a population of 2,233, in 427 households.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Saman Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Saman Bird Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Saman Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Agra Airport (Pandit Deen Dayal Upadhyay) (121 km) and the nearest railway station is Agra Cantt (117 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Saman Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Saman Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Saman Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Saman Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Saman Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sauj, Saman, Mainpuri, Gadanpur, Azizpur, Pharenji.
